active.title: Signal in the Static
active.description: A faint radio signal cuts through the fungal interference—someone is broadcasting from the old subway control room. They're asking for spare parts to boost their signal. Deliver the requested components before their batteries die.

objectives.description: Retrieve a functioning radio capacitor from the abandoned tech stall in Concourse B
Deliver the capacitor to the marked control room before the signal cuts out

rewards.description: Access to a new safe zone frequency and partial subway system maps
Reward of 3 antibiotic tablets (rare medical item)

active.failure_consequences: The signal goes dark permanently, locking away potential ally locations and resources
active.follow_up: The broadcaster may request help fortifying their position after establishing contact
active.notes: Watch for fungal growths near electronics—they cause hallucinations. The tech stall is guarded by a single dormant 'Husher' zombie (slow but deadly in enclosed spaces).
